home.title: Nature Line Resort — Boutique Bed & Breakfast in Khanom, Khanom
home.description: Family-run boutique B&B in Khanom, Khanom. Pool, breakfast, walking distance to the beach. English, French, German & Thai spoken. Book direct for the best rate.

book.title: Book Your Stay — Nature Line Resort
book.description: Reserve your room directly at Nature Line Resort Khanom, Khanom. Real-time availability, no booking fees, instant confirmation.

seo.ogAlt: Nature Line Resort Bed & Breakfast — Khanom, Khanom
seo.keywords: Koh Samui B&B, Khanom bed and breakfast, boutique guesthouse Koh Samui, Nature Line Resort Samui, where to stay in Khanom

hero.headline: Nature Line Resort
hero.subheadline: A warm, welcoming bed & breakfast nestled in the heart of Koh Samui, Thailand.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: A Home Away From Home
about.p1: Nature Line Resort is a charming bed & breakfast on the beautiful island of Koh Samui, Thailand. We offer comfortable rooms, a warm atmosphere, and personalised service in English, French, German, and Thai.
about.p2: Whether you are here for a short escape or an extended stay, our team is dedicated to making every moment of your visit memorable. Wake up to a fresh breakfast, take a dip in the pool, and let the island's magic do the rest.

rooms.label: Accommodation
rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Each room is thoughtfully furnished to balance comfort, style, and the relaxed spirit of island life.

items.name: Cosy Room
items.description: Our most intimate retreat — a bright, air-conditioned room with a king bed, en-suite bathroom and a private terrace. The perfect calm island base for two, steps from the pool.

items.name: Deluxe Room
items.description: A more spacious stay with elevated comfort — king bed, en-suite bathroom, air-conditioning and a private terrace overlooking the garden and pool. A refined, relaxed escape for two.

items.name: Family Room
items.description: Room for the whole family — a king bed plus a single bed, en-suite bathroom and a private terrace. Comfortably sleeps three, with the pool, breakfast and garden just outside your door.

amenities.label: Facilities
amenities.title: Everything You Need
amenities.subtitle: All the comforts of home, with the warmth of a boutique guesthouse.

items.title: Swimming Pool
items.desc: Outdoor pool open daily from 7 am to 9 pm

items.title: Air Conditioning
items.desc: Individual climate control in every room

items.title: Breakfast Included
items.desc: Fresh daily breakfast with local & Western options

items.title: WhatsApp Support
items.desc: Reach us anytime via WhatsApp for any request

items.title: Airport Transfer
items.desc: Convenient pick-up and drop-off on request

items.title: Multilingual Staff
items.desc: Assistance in English, French, German & Thai

items.quote: Staying at Nature Line Resort was the highlight of our Koh Samui trip. The warmth of the hosts and the beautiful garden made us feel instantly at home.
items.name: Sophie & Marc

items.quote: The most charming bed and breakfast we have ever visited. Breakfast was exceptional, the room immaculate, and the location perfect for exploring the island.
items.name: James & Karen

items.quote: We came back for the third time this year — that says everything. Nature Line Resort is not just a place to sleep, it is a place to belong.
items.name: Thomas

contact.label: Find Us
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach us by WhatsApp, email, or use the form below.
contact.address: 123 Moo 4, Khanom, Khanom, Surat Thani 84310, Thailand

form.name: Your Name
form.success: Message sent! We'll reply within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

bookPage.title: Book Your Stay
bookPage.subtitle: Check availability and reserve your room directly. Best rates guaranteed — no booking fees.

booking.title: Book Your Stay
booking.noRooms: No rooms available for these dates. Please try different dates.
booking.minStayNotice: These dates require a minimum stay of {nights} nights. Please choose a longer date range.
booking.name: Full Name
booking.paymentSubtitle: Pay the full amount now to confirm your booking. This payment is non-refundable.
booking.nonRefundableNotice: This payment is non-refundable. Cancellations and no-shows are not eligible for a refund.
booking.acknowledgeNonRefundable: I understand this payment is non-refundable.
booking.acknowledgeRequired: Please confirm the non-refundable payment policy before paying.
booking.paySecureNotice: Powered by Stripe. Your card details never touch our servers.
booking.payError: Payment could not be completed. Please try a different card or contact us.
booking.successDetail: We've sent a confirmation to your email. Reservation #{id}.
booking.errorDetail: Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

bookingConfirmation.subject: Booking confirmed — Nature Line Resort
bookingConfirmation.preheader: Your stay is confirmed. Here are the details.
bookingConfirmation.intro: Your stay at Nature Line Resort is confirmed. We've saved the details below — please keep this email handy for your arrival.
bookingConfirmation.balanceNote: Your booking is paid in full — nothing to pay on arrival.
bookingConfirmation.nonRefundableNote: This payment is non-refundable. Cancellations and no-shows are not eligible for a refund.
bookingConfirmation.contactBody: Reply to this email or message us on WhatsApp at {phone} — we're happy to help with airport transfers, arrival times, or anything else before your stay.
